name: Jina AI Embeddings (8192-token Long-Context Embeddings)
pricing_notes: Free: 1M tokens/month; Pro from $0.018/1M tokens; lowest cost embeddings market

agent_readiness.notes: High-quality embeddings with 8192-token context window. REST API: POST https://api.jina.ai/v1/embeddings. Python: import requests; headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer jina_...', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}; data = {'model': 'jina-embeddings-v3', 'input': ['text1', 'text2'], 'task': 'retrieval.passage'}. response.json()['data'][0]['embedding']. Models: jina-embeddings-v3 (8192 tokens, best quality), jina-embeddings-v2-base-en, jina-clip-v2 (text+image). Tasks: retrieval.query, retrieval.passage, text-matching, classification, separation. Late chunking: process long docs without splitting. Reranker: jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual. Reader: r.jina.ai/URL for web page extraction. Multilingual: 89 languages in v3. OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

gotchas: Must specify 'task' parameter for best results (different tasks = different embeddings)
8192 token context is excellent but very long documents still need strategy
jina-clip-v2 for multimodal only — don't use for text-only embedding tasks
API-only — no local models (Jina open-sources weights separately)
Free tier resets monthly — plan accordingly
best_when: Long document embedding (8192 token context window)
avoid_when: When local/private embeddings required (use fastembed or sentence-transformers)
When OpenAI SDK integration matters more than cost
summary: Jina AI offers high-quality 8192-token embeddings. POST https://api.jina.ai/v1/embeddings; model: jina-embeddings-v3; task: 'retrieval.passage'/'retrieval.query'. Multilingual (89 langs). Reranker: jina-reranker-v2. jina-clip-v2 for text+image. Freemium — 1M tokens free/month, $0.018/1M after. Cheapest quality embeddings. Must specify task param. API-only. Best for long-document RAG and multilingual applications.
